svg.title: MedSearchPro Data Aggregation Flow
svg.desc: Sequential enrichment pipeline from seed drug name through OpenFDA and RxNorm APIs to final JSON output
svg.text: Sequential enrichment pipeline · 3 API calls per medication
MERGE — All fields combined into one flat object
OpenFDA fields + RxNorm fields + Script fields → single entry per drug
No field comes from two sources · No overwrite risk · No conflict
Checkpoint saved every 50 entries · ~1,500 total API calls · 5–10 min runtime
Each color = exclusive owner · No field written by two sources
